embedding_policy.description: Legal-optimized embeddings; fallback to OpenAI if available

vector_db.recommendation: Pinecone for managed serverless, Milvus for on-prem

deployment_instructions.pinecone: Use pinecone-client==3.0.0; initialize index with dimension=384, metric=cosine
deployment_instructions.milvus: Use pymilvus==2.3.0; create collection with schema matching metadata fields
deployment_instructions.local_test: Use faiss==1.7.4 for CPU-based testing without cloud
